chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2592 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 30.03.2023 None present for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with SIP Mirzo Khan on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Muhammad Faisal Arain of PS A-Section Latifabad on behalf of SDPO Latifabad. ----- SSP Hyderabad / respondent No.5 has submitted a report disclosing that alleged detainee has returned home safely as informed by his brother namely Murtaza Qasim and this is a reason no one from petitioner side is present in this case. The report is taken on record. Accordingly, the petition having served its purpose is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
